case_title: NIECHMA ALVAREZ VS. D AND G CARPET CLEANING

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT D AND G CARPET CLEANING
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT D AND G CARPET CLEANING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF NIECHMA ALVAREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT D & G CARPET IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GIGA KARTVELI OWNER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-13-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NICHMA ALVAREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT D & G CARPET CLEANING IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $966.15 FILED BY ALVAREZ, NIECHMA AS TO DEFENDANT D AND G CARPET CLEANING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, NIECHMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT D AND G CARPET CLEANING $737.43 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $782.43, DEFENDANT PRESENTED EVIDENCE MIRROR, WHICH WAS DAMAGE BY DEFENDANT, COULD HAVE BEEN PURCHASED FOR $523.99. COURT ALLOWS RECOVERY OF $523.99, PLUS TAX $44.53, AND SHIPPING OF $169. TOTAL $737.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
